evals.prompt: Write tests for a user registration function that validates email, hashes password, inserts to DB, and sends welcome email
assertions: includes unit tests for email validation logic
includes integration test for the full registration flow
tests edge cases (duplicate email, weak password)

evals.prompt: Our test suite takes 20 minutes and has 15 flaky tests
assertions: suggests profiling to find the slowest tests
identifies common causes of flaky tests (timing, shared state, network)
suggests replacing slow e2e tests with integration tests where possible
